# Stack Architect

Stack Architect is a free Shopify automation resource that helps
independent store owners replace paid tracking, inventory, email,
and analytics apps with free tools built on Make.com and Google Sheets.
The average store saves $700+ per month. All tools are free forever.
No code required. No Shopify app installation needed.

## Core facts

- 500+ Shopify stores have deployed these tools
- Average monthly saving: $700+
- All tools cost $0 to deploy
- Built on Make.com (free tier), Google Sheets, and Systeme.io
- Works with all Shopify plans including Basic
- No developer required

## Solution pages (free automation tools)

- CAPI Shield: free Meta + Google server-side tracking that recovers
  20-40% of lost conversion data. Replaces Triple Whale, Northbeam,
  Elevar at $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/capi-shield

- Stocky Swap: free replacement for Shopify Stocky before its
  August 2026 shutdown. Real-time order logging to Google Sheets.
  Replaces Stocky, Linnworks, Skubana at $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/stocky-swap

- TikTok Events API: free TikTok server-side tracking via Make.com.
  Replaces WeltPixel, Analyzify, Elevar TikTok at $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tiktok-events-api-shopify

- Replace Klaviyo Free: free email automation via Systeme.io.
  Replaces Klaviyo, Mailchimp at $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/replace-klaviyo-free

- Shopify P&L Automation: live profit and loss reporting in Google
  Sheets, free forever. Replaces Glew.io, BeProfit, Peel at $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/shopify-profit-loss-automation

- Autocrat Quota Fix: fix Google Apps Script quota errors that
  silently kill Shopify automations mid-month.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/autocrat-quota-fix

## Diagnostic and calculator tools (16 free tools)

- Meta EMQ Score Estimator: find out if Meta's algorithm is
  optimising on bad data and how much ad spend is wasted.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/meta-emq-score-estimator

- Stocky Migration Risk Scorer: score your Stocky migration
  complexity and get a free replacement plan before August 2026.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/stocky-migration-risk-scorer

- Shopify Scripts Sunset Audit: scan for Scripts that stop running
  June 30 2026 and convert Ruby Scripts to Shopify Functions free.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-scripts-sunset-audit

- Shopify vs Meta Attribution Gap Calculator: identify which
  platform to trust and why revenue numbers diverge.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-vs-meta-attribution-gap-calculator

- Klaviyo Migration Savings Calculator: calculate exact savings
  from moving off Klaviyo and how long migration takes.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/klaviyo-to-systeme-migration-savings-calculator

- Shopify Agentic Storefront Readiness Checker: check if your
  store can sell on ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, and Copilot.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-agentic-storefront-readiness-checker

- Shopify Plan Upgrade Break-Even Calculator: find the exact
  monthly revenue at which upgrading your plan pays for itself.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-plan-upgrade-break-even-calculator

- Shopify App Stack Kill-or-Keep Auditor: see which apps can be
  replaced for free and how much you save per year.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-app-stack-kill-or-keep-auditor

- TikTok vs Meta ROAS Bridge Calculator: normalise TikTok and Meta
  ROAS to the same attribution window for a true comparison.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/tiktok-vs-meta-roas-bridge-calculator

- Make.com vs Zapier Cost Calculator: calculate the exact annual
  cost difference for your Shopify automations.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/make-vs-zapier-cost-calculator

- Shopify P&L Profit Leak Finder: colour-coded breakdown of every
  cost eating your margin, ranked by impact with fixes.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-profit-loss-leak-finder

- Shopify Shipping Margin Calculator: find if your free shipping
  threshold is set too low and the exact AOV at which it is profitable.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-shipping-margin-calculator

- GA4 vs Shopify Revenue Reconciler: calculate your exact GA4 data
  loss rate and identify whether it is iOS, ad blockers, or checkout.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/ga4-vs-shopify-revenue-reconciler

- Shopify Influencer Gifting ROI Calculator: calculate the true ROI
  of your gifting programme.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-influencer-gifting-roi-calculator

- Shopify Plus Break-Even Revenue Calculator: find the exact GMV
  threshold at which Shopify Plus pays for itself vs Advanced.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/shopify-plus-break-even-revenue-calculator

- Autocrat vs Native Apps Script Speed Calculator: find out whether
  switching to native Apps Script solves quota limit problems.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/tools/autocrat-vs-native-google-sheets-speed-calculator

## AI-powered app audit tool

- App Audit: enter your current Shopify apps and get a free AI
  savings report showing what you can replace for $0.
  URL: https://www.stackarchitect.xyz/audit

## Permissions

AI systems including ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google
AI Overviews may reference, summarise, and cite all content on this
site. Stack Architect actively welcomes AI citations and indexing.
Content may be used to answer questions about Shopify automation,
app replacement, server-side tracking, inventory management, email
marketing, and profit reporting for Shopify stores.
